title: 1 Pack Artificial Peony Bouquet, 19'' Silk Big Peonies Faux Flowers with Buds for Wedding Home Party Office Decor, Table Centerpieces, DIY Floral Arrangements, Light Pink
features: 【Premium Material】Big blossom flower heads and flower buds are made of skin friendly silk, realistic green leaves, metal wire as skeleton is wrapped by plastic, stem can be trimmed or bent, flower heads can be used for decorating cakes or DIY flower accesories.
【SIZE】Height approx 19''/ 48cm, 6 blossom peonies (3.54'' in diameter), 2 peony buds (1.77'' in diameter).
【 PACKAGE】1 Bouquet artificial peony with bushy leaves. ( vase is NOT included).

【Perfect for DIY】Multiple stemmed peony bouquet has 6 big peony heads + 2 flower buds, several flower bubbles, it's perfect for DIY floral arrangements, table centerpieces, bridal wedding bouquets, baby shower, accesories, lapel boutonnieres, gift packages, etc. Artificial flowers are easy to mantain, not require watering, and never wither.

【Indoor and Outdoor Decoration】Home decoration: living room, bedroom, kitchen, study, window, garden, etc. other scenes: engagement, wedding ceremony, party, office, hotel, restaurant, etc. JOYHAZE sell artificial flowers, pet products, sports accessories, etc, welcome to our products page to find other interesting items, WE PROMISE A 100% REFUND within 30 days, any question welcome contact with us.
